title: List of Regulatory Authorities for the Purposes of Section C.01A.019 of the Food and Drug Regulations - Canada.ca
content:
## List of Regulatory Authorities for the Purposes of Section C.01A.019 of the Food and Drug Regulations
Please note that the Regulatory Authorities are identified in their official language(s). If the official language is not English or French, and an English or French denomination is known or used at the international level, it is provided in between quotation marks "English equivalent".
Supercedes: 2025-07-03 Date issued: 2026-06-01
Access archived versions of this list.
